---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a user problem CodeSkin should solve
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement, needs-discussion
---

## Problem

What real problem are you trying to solve?

## Who has this problem?

Describe the user group as specifically as possible.

## Current workaround

How do you solve this problem today?

## Proposed outcome

Describe the outcome you want. Avoid prescribing implementation details unless
they are essential.

## Why this matters

How often does this problem occur, and how much does it affect your workflow?

## Alternatives considered

## Willingness to test

Would you be willing to test an early implementation and provide feedback?
Yes / No
